title: Fleshborn Demo
description: A short incremental game where you are tasked to clean a research facility from fleshy growths using your flamethrower. Collect resources and spend them in a vast upgrade tree to unlock new abilities.

title: Choo Choo Defenders Demo
description: Build your track, assemble your train and deliver cargo and carnage in equal amounts in this on-the-rails take on tower defense! This demo lets you play the first world as much as you'd like!

title: 探偵Rと預言者J Demo
description: Gather evidence and uncover the truth through your interactions with others in this mystery adventure game about a case where past and present collide.

title: ThrustX Demo
description: Start as Santa. Unlock a pig, a cop and more. Beat each other senseless in a chaotic 2.5D brawler, with proximity chat, so you can hear them suffer. New fighters every season with a free season pass. Best of five. May the most unhinged player win.

title: Orca Insurgency Demo
description: Play as an orca in a fast-paced ocean rebellion against yachts, whalers, and human greed. Smash boats, rescue your pod, command other orcas, hunt with echolocation, and test absurd weapons from a mysterious octopus arms dealer. The Orca Insurgency begins.

title: Idle AI Factory Demo
description: Dive into the world of machine learning! Idle AI Architecture is a node-based automation incremental game where you harvest resources and train neural networks. Manage your economy, optimize your grid, and automate your way to a multi-million dollar tech empire.

title: ComboChain Pulse Demo
description: ComboChain Pulse is a fast-paced sci-fi arcade shooter where you chain massive combos, destroy enemy fleets, and survive intense bullet-hell battles across futuristic warzones. Master powerful weapons, shields, and lightning-fast combat.

title: Dave's House Demo
description: In this frantic first-person co-op horror, answer the phone before Grandma eats you! Cook the food exactly as ordered, or she’ll eat you! Throw the food on the table and hide—don’t let it fall, or she'll eat you! If she finds you, RUN! If she catches you... don't get eaten!

title: Tattoo Shop Simulator Demo
description: Run your dream tattoo shop! Provide tattoo and piercing services, customize your shop, and manage staff. Unlock new skills and roam the living city freely on your motorcycle. Buy real estate, fight off thugs, and grow from a small shop into the city's biggest brand!

title: Find Eat Hide Till Dawn Demo
Remain At Your Desk Demo
description: Incremental hacker about faking productivity while stealing from your employer. Sell intel for credits or keep it and raise suspicion. One bad audit and you’re back to Intern.

title: Tokyo Re:Connect Demo
description: Spring is the season of first meetings. Begin your new life in the city of Tokyo as Shindou Touki. Meet many colorful characters, forge romances, and live out your high-school days, in this interactive story with cutting-edge artwork and a moving soundtrack.

title: 界墨山河 (INK Mountains And Rivers) Demo
description: 《INK Mountains And Rivers》is a casual ink style idle collection and cultivation game, with themes taken from worldviews similar to Shanhai and Honghuang. It is a mountain and river world full of exotic beasts. Here, you can collect various exotic beasts, cultivate them to become stronger.

title: The Swashbugglers Demo
description: A cartoon-style 2D roguelike autochess focused on tactical strategy. Recruit insect "heroes" from the forest to form a team. Develop their skills, equipment, and stone inscriptions through battles to defeat the source of chaos within the time limit.

title: Tartaria: Frozen Frontier Demo
description: Lead your clan, build settlements, and survive enemy raids in a turn-based strategy set in the harsh northern lands.

title: XX Fulfillment Center Demo
description: You've been hired as a Part-Time Contract Packaging Worker at the fulfillment center.Can you find your own happiness amid the speeding conveyor belts and ever-growing list of rules?

title: Watch Out: Shark! Demo
description: 2D pixel art arcade survival. Brave the ocean's dangers, face the shark, and chase the high score!

title: 極书院演义 Demo
description: A power struggle grips the Polar Academy. As student Yin Tian begins his 2½-year studies, the Emperor and Prince Yan scour the school for talents to use in their conflict. In this elite ..

title: One Dumb Wizard Demo
description: One Dumb Wizard is an action roguelike where you play as a wizard hell-bent on getting their money back from the Bartender. Find charms to power up your wand, parts to craft new wands, and strategically sling spells in your singular mission to GET YOUR MONEY BACK.

title: Don't Mind the Robots Demo
description: Outsmart the robots in this strategic tower defense game. Build deadly mazes, upgrade your towers, and unlock powerful perks. Every decision matters as you adapt your defenses against increasingly stronger waves of AI-infested opponents.

title: One Last Hand Demo
description: Poker meets Battle Royale in One Last Hand, a 2-6 players chaotic party game where poker gets deadly! Forget fair play: attack your rivals with powerful hands, fight for better cards in secret auctions, and bend the rules with powerful relics in thrilling online multiplayer matches.

title: ENDLESS SAMURAI Demo
description: One Strike. Total Tension. A Japanese parry-driven roguelite that blends turn-based depth with fast-paced action. Master the parry. Control the battle.

title: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales Prologue Demo
description: Carry your save data over to the full version of the game in this new prologue demo! Enjoy the opening chapter of the story with the same freedom of adventure as in the full game. Progress in the main quest, explore the unknown, or hunt down new weapons and magicite—the future is up to you.

title: Black Mountain of Tlaltecuhtli  Demo
description: Cinematic Third‑Person Action horror game Climb sheer rock faces, leap across collapsing ruins, and engage in tight, cover‑based firefights against hostile factions who are just as desperate and just as trapped as you. While trying to escape something so evil and primal, civilization ending.

title: The Long Wake: What Remains Observed Demo
description: The town is empty. The nightmare isn’t. A third-person 3D survival horror game with roguelike elements and knowledge-based mechanics. Explore a deserted town trapped in a relentless loop, where each attempt reveals new paths, tools, and truths, escape before time runs out.

title: Lured In Demo
description: Run your own cozy aquarium! Travel to different places to catch all types of fish. Bring them back for idle profits, or sell them for instant cash. Unlock research for new upgrades, and ascend for powerful bonuses. Customize your character and tanks, and make your aquarium your own!

title: Just Prices Demo
description: A sign-language based point-and-click adventure sci-fi game

title: Galactic Speed Legends Demo
description: Compete at full speed in high-stakes sci-fi races. A fast-paced arcade racer where precision timing is everything. Maintain your momentum and push your limits.

title: Don't Get Fired! Demo
description: The company is going under and corporate has made YOU the office manager. Turn things around quick or everyone's doomed. Run the office, keep employees productive, and avoid disasters. Muscle through the workday or automate the grind. Play solo or with friends — just Don't Get Fired!

title: Magnavis Demo
description: Magnavis is a first-person 3D horror game for 1–4 player co-op. Pilot your submarine through tight caves without crashing, complete assigned missions, repair damaged systems, and whatever you do, don’t die.

title: Grey Wake Demo
description: In an intimate narrative-driven exploration game, wake up on a forgotten island between life and death equipped with only a compass, a telescope, and a weathered sailboat. Chart the haunted archipelago, relive faded memories, and uncover the truth about what, and who, you came here to find.

title: Traveler Stories: Journeys of Real People Demo
description: "Is this really the life you want?" A visual novel with simple life-sim elements, based on 80% true stories from world travelers. Step behind the bar in Tokyo, encounter extraordinary lives, and challenge your values. A simulation to rediscover yourself and open the door to a "new you."

title: DEEP DIVER Demo
description: Can you become the most skilled diver capable of reaching the deepest depths on Earth? Every second you spend underwater will become more mysterious, and every meter deeper will be more dangerous. Upgrade your diver with 30 different abilities and skill trees, and try to survive.

title: Team Rocket Project Demo
description: Team Rocket Project Demo played with 1-4 players is set in a retro futuristic world where you guide a rocket! Wield one or more of the 4 thrusters of the rocket and propel it to your destination! Adventure in unique levels, avoid traps and get the highest score! Two levels available in the demo!

title: Moon Garden Demo
description: A cozy incremental game about growing your way home. Strategically plant flowers, optimize machinery, and grow your tree tall enough to escape!

title: Underwater Duo Demo
description: In Underwater Duo, control a smashing turtle with your left hand and a blasting jellyfish with your right! Fight off waves of fierce fish, grow stronger, and see if your two hands can conquer the deep… or team up with a perfectly in-sync partner.

title: DRUMP SIMULATOR Demo
description: A satirical game where you make choices as President Tonald Drump.

title: Where the Echo Sleeps Demo
description: <Where the Echo Sleeps> is a story-driven hospital receptionist simulator with multiple endings. Become a hospital receptionist in a pandemic apocalypse and manage the order in which patients receive treatment.

title: Patchkins Party Demo
description: Patchkins is a multiplayer racing game for 2 to 6 players where you build the course as you play. Each round, players draw and place objects like Platforms, Obstacles, and Specials, then race to the finish without dying.

title: Dolf Demo
description: Underwater mini-golf with cybernetic dolphins. Online multiplayer for 1-8 players.

title: Rhythm Survivors Demo
description: Rhythm Survivors is a single player musical survivor-like. Fight off hordes of increasingly numerous monsters while collecting upgrades to compose powerful sequences of attacks. Only with perfect rhythm can you hope to survive the night!

title: Deeper Demo
description: Go on expeditions with your friends to explore the depths in search of treasures, upgrade your gear, and dive back in deeper.

title: Your Own Cozy Motel Demo
description: Build and run your own roadside motel in a hands-on simulator. Check in guests, clean and repair rooms, manage payments, upgrade facilities, and grow from a small stopover into a thriving, high-reputation business.

title: Man in the Mocha Demo
description: An active incremental game where you own a coffee shop, but your hidden agenda is to hack your customers' devices, steal their data and sell it on the black market for some dirty money. Good thing you've got a coffee shop to launder it! Use your money to buy upgrades and grow your business.

title: PredaDeck Demo
description: PredaDeck is a trading card game that transforms the brutal yet exquisite real-world food chain into a competitive strategic duel. Here, knowledge is your sharpest claw, and strategy is your only law of survival.

title: Flounder Demo
description: The Ocean Ecosystem Roguelite. Grow a colorful school of fish with unique abilities and unlock powerful items to help them repel boss invasions. Collect rare fish to complete your peaceful Virtual Tank. Hold the line and surface victorious! The depth is deceiving.

title: Dread Admiral Demo
description: A turn-based naval roguelite where every ship you lose is gone forever. The Black Fleet hunts you. Your Flagship must survive.

title: Scallywags Demo
description: Set sail with a ragtag group of Scallywags in a strategic pirate crew‑management roguelike. Hunt down the infamous Aces, plunder their treasures, and forge your story one chaotic voyage at a time. Every run is a fresh adventure, and every victory brings you closer to becoming a true Pirate Legend.

title: Fish Lab Demo
description: A short incremental game where you collect fish for your lab. Upgrade by making discoveries. Synced to music.

title: Resurface Demo
description: Escape the ocean depths in this casual incremental mining game. Mine, upgrade, and explore as your strength grows to crazy proportions!

title: Choppy Waves Demo
description: Choppy Waves is an online co-op party game for up to 4 players where you run a floating bar on the open ocean, mixing drinks and serving customers while waves send everyone sliding across the deck.

title: Prerolled Demo
description: Sell prerolled dice to make crazy money in this silly roguelite incremental puzzle mix-up. Pack dice in boxes, make absurd combos and happily overcharge your quirky clients!

title: Cold Decree Demo
description: Cold Decree is an atmospheric detective game that puts you in charge of a forensic laboratory. Scrutinize unsolved case files, analyze objects, and manually query the technical data within massive databases. Stop guessing; identify the perpetrator using only concrete evidence.

title: Crownseeker Demo
description: Hunt relics by day and night across a fog-shrouded world. Manage hunger. Gear up. Outlast or defeat what's hunting you. Collect all the relics — and the Crown appears. If you survive long enough to claim it.

title: Battle Boss Demo
description: Manage your very own battlemon gym! In this demo, experience a few days in the life of a Battle Boss, where it's your job to battle challengers and manage your gym!

title: Deep Sea Fish: Hidden World Demo
description: A short incremental fishing game where you catch fish, earn gold, and unlock powerful upgrades to explore the deep sea.

title: AirDrive Demo
description: Defend the last stronghold on a ravaged Earth against relentless enemies. Take control of your fighter jet with your whole body and face the overwhelming waves of foes. AirDrive is a defense motion-action roguelite featuring endless dogfights, diverse parts, and webcam-based motion controls.

title: Sloop Demo
description: A fast-paced, sea-faring, adventure where you’ll have to learn to turn. Brave the waters in the demo now!

title: 论道聊斋 Demo
description: 以《聊斋》为灵感的中国志怪剧情游戏。以章节形式体验一个个独立的聊斋故事，在文字对话、事件触发与剧情推进中，走入充满人心、执念与因果的东方怪谈世界。
